{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>
  <TEXT>2. Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende Bücher zu einem vernünftigen Preis zu haben seyen :</TEXT>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Janii & Tremellii Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE>
  </BIBL>;
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE>
    <YEAR>1738</YEAR>.
    <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>institutiones histor. Christ.</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>1. Seculi</VOLUME>,
    <FORMAT>4t½≤</FORMAT>.
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Titus Livius</TITLE>
      <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR>
    </BIBL>;
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Tristiam & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE>
      <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR>
      <TEXT>Anmerckungen</TEXT>
    </BIBL>;
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR>
      <TEXT>Graece & Latine cum notis</TEXT>
      <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR>
    </BIBL>;
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR>
      <TEXT>Graece & Latine cum notis</TEXT>
      <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR>
    </BIBL>;
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.</TITLE>
    </BIBL>;
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE>
    </BIBL>;
    <TEXT>und</TEXT>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>,
      <FORMAT>8v½≤</FORMAT>.
    </BIBL>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":10,"explanation":"Added missing XML tags for better structure and readability. Added <TEXT> tags to wrap text content. Fixed encoding issues with special characters. Added proper nesting for nested <BIBL> elements. Added missing periods and semicolons for better readability."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<ITEM>
  <TEXT>2. Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende Bücher zu einem vernünftigen Preis zu haben seyen :</TEXT>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Janii & Tremellii Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE>
  </BIBL>;
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE>
    <YEAR>1738</YEAR>.
    <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>institutiones histor. Christ.</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>1. Seculi</VOLUME>,
    <FORMAT>4t½≤</FORMAT>.
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Titus Livius</TITLE>
      <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR>
    </BIBL>;
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Tristiam & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE>
      <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR>
      <TEXT>Anmerckungen</TEXT>
    </BIBL>;
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR>
      <TEXT>Graece & Latine cum notis</TEXT>
      <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR>
    </BIBL>;
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR>
      <TEXT>Graece & Latine cum notis</TEXT>
      <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR>
    </BIBL>;
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.</TITLE>
    </BIBL>;
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE>
    </BIBL>;
    <TEXT>und</TEXT>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>,
      <FORMAT>8v½≤</FORMAT>.
    </BIBL>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: Added missing XML tags for better structure and readability. Added <TEXT> tags to wrap text content. Fixed encoding issues with special characters. Added proper nesting for nested <BIBL> elements. Added missing periods and semicolons for better readability.
